tdd_evidence.red_commit_description: test(0.8.2/E2 fix-1): RED — rerank_passages returns Result + non-finite score rejects (codex §9 [P2]); 4 tests fail (NaN/+inf/-inf/mixed-pool assert is_err but get Ok because no guard yet)
tdd_evidence.green_commit_description: fix(0.8.2/E2 fix-1): GREEN — is_finite guard + default-reranker forwarded to dev/test builds; all 5 pr_e2_rerank_nonfinite tests pass

findings_addressed.description: fathomdb.rerank(depth>0) silently returns IDENTITY in dev/test builds — default-reranker not forwarded
findings_addressed.fix: Added `default-reranker = ["fathomdb-engine/default-reranker"]` to fathomdb-py/Cargo.toml [features]; added "default-reranker" to pyproject.toml [tool.maturin] features list; added `default-reranker` to conftest.py maturin-develop fixture feature string. Verified: cargo build -p fathomdb-py --features default-reranker resolves via new passthrough.
findings_addressed.release_ci_note: release.yml and ci.yml have no default-reranker entry (grep confirmed clean); shipped wheel surface unchanged.

findings_addressed.description: fathomdb.rerank accepts non-finite score (NaN/±inf) → NaN blended scores / unstable sort order
findings_addressed.fix: Changed `rerank_passages` in fathomdb-engine to return `Result<Vec<(u64, f64)>, String>`; added is_finite() check before building SearchHits — returns Err("rerank: non-finite score for passage id=…") immediately. PyO3 binding propagates inner Err as WriteValidationError. Added pr_e2_rerank_nonfinite.rs (ungated, 5 tests) covering NaN, +Inf, -Inf, mixed-pool, and the finite-ok sanity path.

self_check.cargo_clippy_fathomdb_py_with_default_re: PASS — Finished dev profile, no errors
